author: Emir A.
pros: I had the chance to know more about KLibre and RNV Analytics at the Smart Retail Tech Expo 2024. The feedback I have got for the AI based inventory optimisation solution they offer is just brilliant.
cons: I don’t have a particular thing that I didn’t like abut the product or the company. It is innovative and advanced.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall, I am satisfied with my experience with KLibre. The user-friendly interface made it easy to use, and I highly appreciated the accessibility and quick response of the support team.
author: Aydın A.
pros: The user-friendly interface and the accessibility and quick response of the support team.
cons: The inability to run multiple transfers simultaneously and the lack of flexibility to schedule them at my preferred time limited my overall experience.

author: Solen S.
pros: Ease of use Flexibility Visuals Business Relevancy
cons: Overall, I was very happy. Nothing that I can say for this.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Seamless Experience with Dedicated Support and Broader Accessibility
author: neşe E.
pros: Klibre’s dedicated customer support team stands out by promptly addressing inquiries and resolving concerns. Their efficient and timely assistance guarantees a seamless user experience, enhancing overall satisfaction with the platform.
cons: Expanding Klibre’s language options can enhance accessibility and create a more inclusive experience for users worldwide.

description: With KLibre, you can easily say goodbye to manual guesswork, overstocked shelves, and missed sales opportunities. The platform empowers us to stay one step ahead of demand, improving our bottom line while ensuring customer satisfaction.
author: Baris D.
pros: With KLibre, you can achieve optimal inventory levels, minimizing excess stock while avoiding stockouts. The platform takes into account historical data, market trends, seasonality, and demand forecasting to provide accurate inventory recommendations tailored to our business needs. But that's not all. KLibre goes beyond just inventory optimization. The platform also enables us to automate replenishment processes, track supplier performance, and gain valuable insights into demand patterns
cons: It is a highly technological product, so they should improve the onboarding processes. Currently, they have valuable Customer Success managers for the onboarding process however some users need additional time to complete.

review_title: Thank you KLibre for this great product at an affordable price!
description: Sales Forecasting, Decision Support, and Data Analysis.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: KLibre has revolutionized the way we manage our inventory. Its advanced algorithms and machine learning capabilities have significantly improved our forecasting accuracy, helping us reduce carrying costs and minimize stockouts simultaneously. The tool's user-friendly interface and customizable dashboards make it accessible for both data experts and non-technical users, making collaboration seamless. Furthermore, the ability to adapt to changing market conditions and supply chain disruptions is a game-changer, ensuring that we always stay ahead in our inventory management strategies. Highly recommended for businesses looking to streamline operations and boost profitability.
cons: I believe that with some refinements in user support and integration processes, this tool could become an indispensable asset for businesses seeking to optimize their inventory effectively.

review_title: High Output Quality for Enhanced Productivity
author: Buse G.
pros: The high output quality provided by Klibre plays a critical role in enhancing productivity for companies. With its AI integration, meaningful insights are derived from data, while its ability to rapidly generate solutions continues to optimize business processes.
cons: I have not notice any cons about KLibre.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Cagatay G.
pros: Perfectly designed, so easy to use and customized solutions addressed to the exact business needs.
cons: Nothing serious. In fact, Klibre team is taking all the feedbacks into account and improving product constantly.

review_title: Rapid Integration into ERP Business Processes with Flexibility and Ease of Use
description: RNV Klibre has demonstrated its ability to deliver on all its promises and even more, with quick, agile, and value-adding responses throughout the entire pre-sale and post-sale process. Thanks to its easy-to-use and adaptive structure, it has enabled us to manage the inventory of warehouses and stores quickly and accurately.
author: Efe Ethem G.
pros: Klibre's flexibility and ease of use enable companies to integrate quickly into their ERP processes. Even in challenging scenarios, its ability to rapidly generate solutions enhances operational efficiency, strengthening competitive advantage.
cons: The lack of a structure to compare the processes conducted before with the suggestions made after implementation makes it difficult to measure the gains. Of course, the companies purchasing the product can make this comparison with their own reporting capabilities.

review_title: KLibre: The Smart Inventory Wizard That’s Revolutionizing Our Stock Management
description: KLibre is like the cool inventory wizard in our toolkit. It’s kicked the manual guesswork to the curb, made overstocked shelves a thing of the past, and ensured we don’t miss out on selling opportunities. It's like having a crystal ball that helps us stay ahead in the game, boosting our profits while keeping our customers smiling.
author: Yilmaz Y.
pros: KLibre simply nails it when it comes to keeping our inventory just right - not too much and never too little. The way it digs into past data, rides the market waves, and peeps into seasonal changes to throw accurate inventory advice our way is quite impressive. Plus, it doesn’t stop there. From automating our refill orders to keeping tabs on how our suppliers are doing and decoding the rhythm of demand patterns, KLibre has got our back.
cons: The techy side of KLibre can be a bit of a climb. Sure, they've got these super helpful Customer Success folks to guide through the onboarding, but sometimes it feels like we could use a bit more time to get fully on board without feeling rushed.

review_title: the most efficient SaaS in every aspect
description: The service provided by K-Libre is currently delivered only through consultancy in Turkey. This makes it dependent on human resources and limited to 'guidance' and 'ideas' only. However, K-Libre also provides an output, and these outputs are entirely data-driven. Through end-to-end management, it enables us to make more accurate predictions about the future. Its unquestionable positive impact on revenue is a clear benefit it offers.
author: Yağmur Y.
pros: It provides a more efficient version of all the data and output we could obtain from manual consultancy in terms of ease of use, in the form of software (independent of a human)
cons: So far, I have not identified any negative/aspects I dislike about it.

author: Mustafa Alp A.
pros: Ease of use and the quality of the output.
cons: Can be a better ortantasion program for new starters

author: Çiğdem Y.
pros: Demand planning and sales forecast. These 2 was very important to company to make good match sales and planning. Because in pharmacy sector, excess demand creates a big problems about cash management because of high cost.
cons: We like dashboards a lot but it can improve.

description: I really would recommend K-Libre to anyone which has multiple sales points and facing difficulties on distribution. We can meet the right customer demand with the right level of stocks, avoiding costs. Plus, we avoid stock outs for any product which enhances customer experience.
author: Egemen T.
pros: The inventory management is excellent that really helps the bottom line and keeping the stocks low.
cons: They can add more modules in the system such as product sourcing and planning… Apart from that, great SaaS investment.

review_title: Right product at right location at the right time
author: Efe T.
pros: The integration process was quite easy with a Turkish ERP (Nebim V3) which usually takes a long time and effort to integrate. K-Libre tam members were very friendly and eager to help.
cons: K-Libre currently does not offer customer data and CRM tools. The software and the team have the potential to implement new solutions.

review_title: We got ahead of competition with KLibre
description: Amazing onboarding and customer support helped us benefit KLibre's capabilities quickly
author: Kursad A.
pros: Being able to increase sales just by managing inventories across the stores and main warehouse accurately.
cons: The number of data sources they are integrated with may need to be increased

description: After Sales Service and always on User support on daily practices as a consultancy is valuable
author: Berker C.
pros: Inventory is not considered as a warehouse item also cares sales, reporting, aging, recommendations besides inventory control
cons: Feedbacks of customers and to listen its customers Will minimize if available.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Nuray E.
pros: Klibre's rapid and seamless ERP integration process enables companies to quickly optimize their operations. Its AI-powered solutions streamline the ERP integration process, while its ability to deliver high-quality outputs and generate rapid solutions helps companies gain a competitive edge.
cons: The design could be better. It could be easier and more understandable.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Esat O.
pros: It's very easy to use and reach to desired features
cons: Integration with other apps can be improved

review_title: KLibre takes the business to next level

pros: Inventory management tool and dashboard management
cons: Nothing negative to mention about the tool
author_profession: Head of Franchisee south east Europe

cons: API documentation needs to improve as it is unlikely to manage integration without live support.
